clip_prompt_templates.spike: a dramatic high-speed crash or collision in a racing game: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.tension: two cars racing side-by-side battling for position on a racetrack: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.comedy: a funny spin-out or unexpected racing fail with the car flying off track: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.drama: a nail-biting photo finish in a racing game with cars crossing the line: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.triumph: a player celebrating a first-place victory on the podium in a racing game: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.discovery: a player finding a hidden shortcut or alternate route in a racing game: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.drift: a car performing a long controlled drift through a series of corners: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.crash: a spectacular multi-car pileup or barrier crash at high speed: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.near_miss: a car narrowly avoiding a crash at high speed with millimeters to spare: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.overtake: a car overtaking a rival on the inside of a tight corner: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.speed_burst: a car activating nitro boost and surging past opponents at extreme speed: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.HIGH_SPEED: a car holding a high-speed racing line with strong forward momentum: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.DRIFT: a car performing a long controlled drift through a corner sequence: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.CRASH: a racing car crashing, colliding, or losing control at speed: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.SPEED_BURST: a car accelerating hard or using boost in a racing game: {context}
clip_prompt_templates.RACING_MOMENT: a cinematic racing moment with sustained speed and motion: {context}

event_rules.description: High lateral optical flow with sustained speed indicates drifting
Sudden motion and audio spike indicates a crash or collision
Brief high motion with camera shake but no crash audio
Detected vehicle nearby with lateral movement indicates passing
Sudden speed increase with forward motion indicates nitro or boost

track_boundary_zone.description: Lower screen area often contains HUD speedometer and map

rearview_zone.description: Top center area often shows rearview mirror in cockpit view
